_comment: Only two channels are supported: 'preview' (ROCm 7.2.1) and 'stable' (ROCm 7.12.x). Both pull binaries directly from AMD's official deb mirror at https://repo.radeon.com/rocm/apt/. Any other version or source must be rejected by the install step.

stable.description: AMD-official ROCm 7.12.x from repo.radeon.com (latest 7.12 patch release)
stable.note: As of 2026-04-22, 7.12 is not yet published at repo.radeon.com/rocm/apt/. Workflow fails fast until AMD publishes; no fallback to distro packages or TheRock S3.
